plugins.name: ai-agent-manager-plugin
plugins.description: AI agents v13.1.0 — Two purely additive hardening features. (1) NOTIFICATION SURFACE: two new hooks (PreToolUse[AskUserQuestion] and Notification) fire OS-native desktop banners via notify-desktop.sh whenever the plugin pauses for user input (Supervisor adjudication, rubric gate, Launch Pad Phase 6, /autonomous merge-and-continue). send-webhook.sh extended with a parallel paused-event payload for Slack/Discord. Desktop notifications default-on (opt-out via AI_AGENT_MANAGER_DESKTOP_NOTIFICATIONS=0), webhook opt-in (AI_AGENT_MANAGER_WEBHOOK_URL). (2) LAUNCH_PAD_RESULT SCHEMA: Launch Pad now emits a structured result block (schema_version 1, status saved|discarded|blocked|aborted, saved_brief_path); /autonomous PLAN phase reads it directly, making the v13.0.x concurrent-session ambiguity unlikely when the block validates; ls-diff retained as fallback for absent or malformed blocks. Schema is exactly 4 fields by design (discipline cap to prevent CODE_REVIEW_RESULT v3-style validation bloat). ls-diff retained as fallback for pre-v13.1.0 plugins. Builds on v13.0.0's /autonomous slash command — chains /launch-pad → /supervisor with opt-in multi-iteration re-planning (--allow-multi-iteration) on two SUPERVISOR_RESULT signals (rubric_score N<M with user-merge confirmation; failed + inter_subtask_gap). v13.1 purely additive on top of v13.0.1 — no agent removed, no existing schema changed, no behavioral change to any existing hook/script/skill/command. Preserves all v12.2.0 / v12.1.0 / v12.0.0 / prior layers. 13 agent roles, 50 reusable skills, 19 quality gate hooks, 12 slash commands, persistent agent memory, bundled MySQL MCP server.
